category_sources: source_facts.description says it writes command-line pipes with instant live preview; official GitHub README describes Ultimate Plumber as an interactive terminal UI for Linux pipes.

docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes usage, notes, and future ideas.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/akavel/up, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes terminal-based UI, Linux pipes, instant preview, and command-line pipeline building; GitHub topics include linux, tui, pipes, live-programming, and instant-preview.
